title: Phase 15: PSM 0x00FA GraphicGroup Records
objective: 为 Sheet 流中的 PSM 0x00FA GraphicGroup / GraphicPersist records 建立保守 typed decoder，并把 geometry OID 与 group / parent / child reference evidence 关联起来。
evidence: Initial goal package scaffolded from Phase 14 final summary and Slice Q probe findings; implementation not started.
Command produced no output and was stopped after hanging; critical docs are drafted but have not passed Plannotator gate in this session.
Probe now prints bounded hit counts, size buckets, sub_type distribution, parent_ref distribution, nearby known PSM geometry records, and candidate OID words matched against known geometry OIDs.

artifact: Current broad scan counts: DWG-0201=136, DWG-0202=84, 工艺管道及仪表流程-1=125, A01=8; parent_ref=6 for every candidate; output shows candidate geometry OIDs in variable tail.

summary: Initial layout note records stable header, size buckets, parent_ref invariant in current fixtures, candidate OID patterns, rejected interpretations, and safe first decoder contract.

Added conservative parser-level SheetGraphicGroupDecoded DTO plus decode_graphic_groups/decode_graphic_group_at. Decoder validates type_code 0x00FA, zero type flags, bounded even payload, oid!=0, parent_ref=6, zero reserved prefix, small group_kind_word, and retains raw tail without stable child_oids.
Added decode_graphic_groups/decode_graphic_group_at to adversarial byte parser smoke test matrix.

command: cargo test --locked --lib graphic_group && cargo test --locked -j 1 --test parser_panic_safety
artifact: graphic_group unit tests: 9 passed; parser_panic_safety: 2 passed.

summary: Added parser-level real fixture ratchet for decode_graphic_groups. Conservative counts are DWG-0201=135, DWG-0202=84, 工艺管道及仪表流程-1=125, A01=8, total=352. Analysis note now distinguishes broad probe 353, conservative parser ratchet 352, and unreproducible legacy Phase 14 count 250.

Probe now prints geometry-OID candidate summary grouped by (bytes_to_follow, sub_type_word). Repeated offsets vary by bucket: btf=54 uses +026, btf=66 commonly +034 and sometimes +022, btf=104 uses +034, btf=122 uses +046/+058/+078 with optional +034, btf=154 around +050, while btf=44 often has no known geometry OID. This supports audit-only candidate reporting but not a stable child_oids field.

Added audit-only SheetGeometry::decoded_graphic_groups with DecodedGraphicGroupRecord. Cluster pipeline maps decode_graphic_groups into this collection, but geometry.rs does not emit PidGraphicEntity records and no child_oids field is exposed. The fixture ratchet now asserts SheetGeometry audit collection counts mirror parser-level counts.

Final verification passed. The repository bash shim is unavailable on this Windows machine (WindowsApps bash reports REGDB_E_CLASSNOTREG), so missing-docs was run with the same cargo rustdoc command and manual count: rustdoc_exit=0, current=0, baseline=0.

Marked AC1-AC11 complete, updated verification matrix with actual results, reconciled legacy 250 vs current 353/352 counts, and recorded blocker status: stable header / audit collection resolved, variable tail child OID list remains audit-only and normalized geometry association is deferred.

Added Phase 15 final summary documenting audit-only scope, 352 conservative fixture ratchet, broad 353 vs legacy 250 count reconciliation, stable field contract, verification commands, and remaining boundaries.
